treatment_information.specific_treatment: mitral valve repair via trans-septal approach
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Triangular resection and edge-to-edge suturing of the medial posterior leaflet and commissure, mitral annuloplasty using a semi-rigid ring (Carpentier-Edwards Physio II Annuloplasty Ring, 28 mm)
treatment_information.treatment_response: No residual mitral valve regurgitation, uneventful recovery

treatment_timeline.event: Patient referred for treatment of severe mitral valve regurgitation
Mitral valve repair performed via trans-septal approach
Patient discharged from intensive care unit
